landing.hero_subtitle: An 8-factor quantitative strategy with fixed 65/35 equity/gold allocation, walk-forward validated across {years} years. Designed for patient, long-term capital seeking systematic alpha with institutional-grade risk management.
landing.equity_chart_subtitle: Walk-forward out-of-sample results vs NIFTY 50 and NIFTY LargeMidcap 250 buy-and-hold. Normalised to 100 at inception.
landing.deep_dive_subtitle: Detailed analytics dashboard with per-window breakdowns, drawdown analysis, and factor performance.

process_steps.title: Quality Pre-Screening
process_steps.description: Hard filters remove fundamentally weak stocks before factor scoring. Excludes companies with negative earnings, low return on capital (<8%), excessive leverage (D/E >1.5), thin margins (<3%), deteriorating profitability, or low return on equity (<5%).

process_steps.title: Factor-Based Stock Selection
process_steps.description: 8 quantitative factors spanning momentum, trend, value, and quality. Cross-sectional ranking of NIFTY LargeMidcap 250 constituents. Top 25 positions with 8% max single-stock weight, rebalanced daily across 50 staggered tranches.

process_steps.title: Strategic Asset Allocation
process_steps.description: Fixed 65% equity / 35% gold allocation provides consistent diversification. Gold acts as a structural hedge, reducing drawdowns without the noise penalty of dynamic market timing.

process_steps.title: Walk-Forward Validation
process_steps.description: {windows} non-overlapping out-of-sample windows. 2-year training, 6-month testing, rolled forward sequentially. Survivorship-bias-free using 96 NSE constituent snapshots.

rows.label: Universe
rows.efp: NIFTY LargeMidcap 250 only — zero small-cap risk

landing.cta_headline:
For Qualified Investors Seeking Systematic,
Research-Driven Portfolio Management
landing.cta_body: Minimum investment ₹1 Crore. Available to qualified investors who understand and accept the risks of systematic equity strategies.

approach.page_subtitle: A systematic, rules-based investment process combining factor-based stock selection, strategic asset allocation, and rigorous out-of-sample validation.
philosophy_paragraphs: We believe that markets reward certain persistent risk premia — momentum, value, quality, and trend — that can be harvested systematically. Rather than relying on human judgement or conviction-based stock picking, we use a quantitative model that ranks stocks on 8 measurable factors and constructs portfolios purely based on data.

Equally important is how capital is allocated. We maintain a fixed 65% equity / 35% gold allocation, providing consistent diversification across market cycles. Our research showed that dynamic market timing signals have near-zero predictive power for forward returns, so we avoid the noise penalty of regime-switching and capture gold's structural diversification benefit instead.

Every aspect of our methodology is walk-forward validated — we never use future data to make past decisions. This discipline ensures that our track record reflects what an investor would have actually experienced, not an optimised backtest.
approach.factor_section_subtitle: Stocks are selected exclusively from the NIFTY LargeMidcap 250 universe — no small-cap exposure, only India’s top 250 companies by market capitalisation. Ranked across four factor categories, with the top 25 stocks by composite score selected with an 8% max single-stock weight cap, rebalanced daily across 50 staggered tranches.

factor_categories.name: Momentum
factor_categories.description: Multiple timeframe price and earnings momentum signals

factor_categories.name: Quality
factor_categories.description: Profitability, capital efficiency, and balance sheet strength

factor_categories.name: Trend
factor_categories.description: Price trend strength, proximity to highs, and volatility contraction

approach.quality_filter_subtitle: Before factor scoring, hard filters remove fundamentally weak stocks from the investable universe. This quality gate reduces exposure to value traps and financially stressed companies.

quality_criteria.name: Positive Earnings
quality_criteria.description: Excludes companies with negative earnings yield — no loss-making stocks enter the portfolio

quality_criteria.name: Return on Capital >8%
quality_criteria.description: Minimum ROCE threshold ensures capital is deployed efficiently

quality_criteria.name: Leverage Check
quality_criteria.description: Debt-to-equity below 1.5x for non-financial companies (banks and NBFCs exempted as leverage is their business model)

quality_criteria.name: Operating Margins >3%
quality_criteria.description: Filters out companies with unsustainably thin margins

quality_criteria.name: Margin Stability
quality_criteria.description: Excludes stocks where operating margins have deteriorated by more than 40% year-on-year

quality_criteria.name: Return on Equity >5%
quality_criteria.description: Minimum ROE threshold removes companies generating poor shareholder returns

approach.regime_subtitle: A fixed 65% equity / 35% gold allocation provides consistent diversification. Gold reduces portfolio volatility and drawdowns while equities drive long-term growth.
approach.allocation_chart_subtitle: Fixed 65/35 equity/gold allocation across all rebalance cycles. Each bar represents a rebalance point (50 daily staggered tranches per cycle).
approach.wf_section_subtitle: The strongest test of any investment strategy is whether it works on data it has never seen. We use walk-forward validation — the gold standard in systematic trading research.
approach.wf_description: How it works: In each window, the model optimises factor weights on the training data (2 years), then applies those weights to the subsequent test period (6 months) that it has never seen. Within each test window, the portfolio is rebalanced daily via 50 staggered tranches with an 8% maximum single-stock weight cap, reducing timing risk and market impact. Each tranche rebalances every 50 trading days, substantially reducing portfolio turnover. The portfolio track record is built entirely from these test periods — none of the reported returns come from in-sample data.
approach.wf_survivorship: Survivorship bias elimination: At each point in time, the stock universe is reconstructed from official NSE constituent PDFs. We maintain 96 point-in-time snapshots covering 338 unique stocks, ensuring that only stocks that were actually in the index at that time are considered.

performance.page_subtitle: Walk-forward out-of-sample results from {period_start} to {period_end}. All returns include 10 bps round-trip slippage.
performance.methodology_note: All results are out-of-sample, walk-forward validated across {windows} non-overlapping windows. No in-sample optimization of parameters. Fixed 65/35 equity/gold allocation. Staggered daily rebalancing (50 tranches, each rebalancing every 50 trading days) with 8% max single-stock weight cap. Survivorship-bias-free constituent data from 96 NSE official monthly snapshots covering 464 unique stocks. 10 bps round-trip slippage applied to all trades. {trades:,} total trades across {years} years.

about.page_subtitle: Quantitative research meets disciplined portfolio management. Built on data, validated by rigour.
firm_description: EFP Wealth is a quantitative portfolio management firm focused on Indian equities. We apply systematic, factor-based strategies to construct concentrated portfolios that aim to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns over market cycles.

Our edge is not a secret formula — it is process. Every decision in our investment pipeline is rules-based, testable, and reproducible. We publish our methodology transparently because we believe that honest performance speaks louder than marketing narratives.
We serve a select group of qualified investors who value rigorous research, transparent reporting, and a long-term orientation over short-term performance chasing.

principles.title: Data Over Narrative
principles.description: Investment decisions are driven by quantitative signals, not market commentary or gut feelings. Every position has a measurable rationale.

principles.title: Honest Validation
principles.description: We test strategies on data they have never seen. Walk-forward validation prevents overfitting and ensures the track record is genuine.

principles.title: Risk Before Return
principles.description: A fixed 65/35 equity/gold allocation prioritises capital preservation. Gold provides structural downside protection across market cycles.

principles.title: Radical Transparency
principles.description: Our methodology, factors, signals, and validation process are fully disclosed. Investors know exactly how their capital is managed.

disclaimers.banner_text: All returns shown are BACKTESTED, HYPOTHETICAL results using historical data. They do NOT represent actual trading. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Investments are subject to market risks. This is not investment advice.
disclaimers.sticky_text: Backtested, hypothetical results. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Not investment advice.
disclaimers.footer_text: IMPORTANT DISCLOSURES: All returns shown are based on walk-forward backtested results using historical data and are HYPOTHETICAL. They do not represent actual trading and were derived with the benefit of hindsight. Past performance does not guarantee future results and is not indicative of future returns. Backtested performance has inherent limitations: (1) it is designed with the benefit of hindsight, (2) it does not reflect the impact of economic and market factors differently than during the backtested period, (3) it cannot fully account for the impact of financial risk in actual trading, (4) actual results may differ due to market conditions, liquidity, and execution differences. Walk-forward validation mitigates overfitting but does not eliminate it. 10 bps round-trip slippage applied. Does not include management fees, taxes, stamp duty, STT, or impact costs beyond slippage. Strategy results assume full investment at model signals; actual investor returns may differ. Investments in securities are subject to market risks. Read all related documents carefully before investing.
disclaimers.methodology_disclosure: Walk-forward backtested performance using 21 non-overlapping 6-month out-of-sample windows from 2015-2026. Factor weights optimised on 2-year training windows. Fixed 65/35 equity/gold allocation. 50 staggered tranches, each rebalancing every 50 trading days, with 8% max single-stock weight. Survivorship-bias-corrected using 96 point-in-time NSE constituent snapshots covering 464 unique stocks. Constituent data may have gaps of up to 6 months in recent periods.
disclaimers.bias_disclosures: Potential biases: (1) Survivorship bias — mitigated via point-in-time constituent data (96 snapshots); 46 of 464 historical constituents have incomplete data (6.1% of constituent-months). (2) Look-ahead bias — mitigated via walk-forward validation (no future data in training). (3) Data-snooping bias — 8 weight presets tested per window; risk of overfitting partially addressed by out-of-sample validation. (4) Transaction cost bias — 10 bps round-trip slippage applied; actual costs may differ. (5) Selection bias — NIFTY LargeMidcap 250 universe selected ex-ante, not cherry-picked.
